name: Sorting Your Marbles
short_description: The goal is simple: guide each colored marble to a flag of the same color by clicking on intersections to control the track's destination. How many marbles can you sort?
detailed_description: Sorting Your Marbles is a masterwork of a focus game. With delicately crafted graphics, a high-quality soundscape, and a robust procedural generation system, S.Y.M. provides an ultimate brain game experience. The goal is simple: guide each colored marble to a flag of the same color by clicking on intersections to control the track's destination. How many marbles can you sort?
about_the_game: Sorting Your Marbles is a masterwork of a focus game. With delicately crafted graphics, a high-quality soundscape, and a robust procedural generation system, S.Y.M. provides an ultimate brain game experience. The goal is simple: guide each colored marble to a flag of the same color by clicking on intersections to control the track's destination. How many marbles can you sort?
